title: A New Student in Class
description: This is a simple story about a classroom and the introduction of a new student, Yuki-san, adapted for Genki I Chapter 1 learners.

title: Kenji's Bento
titleJa: ケンジさん の べんとう
description: This story introduces Kenji, a college student, and describes the contents of his bento box using basic identification and noun-linking grammar.

title: My Japanese High School
description: A student is getting ready for her first day at a Japanese high school, describing her identity and the items she has prepared.

title: At the Bookstore
description: A high school student and their friend Ken are at a bookstore. They describe the location, different books, and a pen, using basic Japanese grammar for identification and questions.

title: My Friend Sakura
description: A short story about a student's new friend, Sakura, in their Japanese class, using only Genki I Chapter 2 grammar and vocabulary.

title: My School Walk
description: A short story describing a student's walk to high school with a friend, focusing on identifying objects and places using Genki I Chapter 2 grammar and vocabulary.
